item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-017","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"Assistant rejected the malformed yes/no framing, decomposed the programmer role into replaceable routine coding versus harder business/architecture/risk/coordination tasks, and still provided a compressed answer.
